prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.startWriting: Start writing to see a preview.

versions.title: Version History
versions.description: Immutable snapshots created whenever this prompt is saved.
versions.restored: Version restored as the current working copy
versions.noDiff: This version matches the current working copy.

editor.contentPlaceholder: Write your prompt here... Use {{variable}} for dynamic values.
editor.sourcePlaceholder: Where did this prompt come from?
editor.tagsPlaceholder: Type and press Enter to add tags

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.captureContentPlaceholder: Paste or type your prompt here...
inbox.empty: Inbox is empty. Capture a prompt to get started.

modules.title: Modules
modules.noModules: No modules found. Create one to get started.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Star a prompt to add it here.

tags.title: Tags
tags.empty: No tags yet. Add tags to your prompts or modules.

playground.title: Agent Playground
playground.description: Paste any prompt text to see how the agent analyzes it. This is a sandbox for testing classification, risk detection, variable extraction, and similarity matching.
playground.placeholder: Paste a prompt here to analyze...

settings.title: Settings
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all prompts, modules, and settings as JSON
settings.importDataDesc: Restore from a previously exported JSON file
settings.resetSettingsDesc: Restore default settings (does not delete data)

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Wrap your strongest prompts into reusable capabilities with a goal, schemas, and an optional collection pack.
skills.empty: No skills yet. Create one from a saved prompt to turn an asset into a reusable capability.
skills.emptyFiltered: No skills match the current health filter yet.

hints.all: Everything in your current capability catalog.
hints.ready: Skills with baseline, benchmark, and recent validation aligned.
hints.watch: Skills that show promise but still need stronger validation.
hints.setup: Skills that still need baseline, benchmark, or live run evidence.

priorities.title: Priority Queue
priorities.description: The next capabilities worth stabilizing based on missing baseline, benchmark, or validation signals.
priorities.empty: Nothing urgent right now. Your active skills already have the core evidence they need.

reasons.needsBaseline: Set a baseline on the entry prompt so future evolution stays anchored.
reasons.needsBenchmark: Run a benchmark to score the current capability before expanding it.
reasons.needsValidation: Capture a live validation run to confirm the rendered prompt still behaves well.
reasons.needsIteration: Recent evaluation still suggests iteration before calling this production-ready.
reasons.stable: This skill already has the key signals needed for reuse.

skills.goalDescription: Define the concrete user outcome this skill should consistently deliver.
skills.schemaDescription: Use simple field contracts to describe what this skill expects and what it should return.
skills.noBenchmark: No benchmark run yet for this skill's entry prompt.
skills.baselineSummaryFallback: This baseline is active and ready to anchor future evolution comparisons.
skills.noBaseline: No baseline version has been chosen for the entry prompt yet.
skills.copyRecentRunPromptFailed: Failed to copy the recent run prompt
skills.noRecentRuns: No recent skill runs recorded yet.

health.title: Capability Health
health.description: Track whether this skill has a baseline, a current benchmark, and a recent validation run.
health.baselineMissing: Choose a baseline version on the entry prompt first.
health.benchmarkRecommended: The latest benchmark recommends production use.
health.benchmarkIterate: The latest benchmark suggests more iteration.
health.benchmarkMissing: Run a benchmark on the entry prompt to score this skill.
health.recentRunMissing: Run the skill once to capture a live validation signal.

headlines.ready: This skill has the core signals needed for confident reuse.
headlines.watch: This skill is promising, but the validation loop is still incomplete.
headlines.setup: This skill still needs baseline, benchmark, or run evidence.

notes.ready: Baseline, benchmark, and recent validation are all present. Continue iterating only when you want to improve quality or scope.
notes.watch: At least one signal is present, but you still need stronger evidence before treating this as stable production capability.
notes.setup: Use the current entry prompt to establish a baseline, run a benchmark, and validate the rendered prompt with a recent skill run.

listSummaries.ready: Baseline, benchmark, and validation are aligned.
listSummaries.watch: Some validation signals exist, but the loop is still incomplete.
listSummaries.setup: This skill still needs benchmark or run evidence.

skills.deleteDescription: This removes the capability shell, but leaves the prompt and collection assets intact.

form.description: Define the capability, point it at an entry prompt, and describe the input/output contract.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: A short explanation of what this skill does.
form.goalPlaceholder: Help a learner improve spoken English in one month with a structured daily plan.
form.notesPlaceholder: Operational notes, guardrails, or rollout reminders.
form.inputSchemaDescription: Describe the inputs this skill expects from a caller or UI.
form.outputSchemaDescription: Describe the outputs this skill should reliably return.
form.schemaEmpty: No schema fields yet. Add the important fields you want to standardize.

run.copyFailed: Failed to copy the rendered prompt
run.inputsDescription: Fill the capability inputs, then generate a concrete prompt instance for execution or review.
run.presetsDescription: Restore your latest values or save named parameter sets for repeated runs.
run.recentRestoredHint: Recent inputs were restored automatically for this skill.
run.noRecentValues: No recent values have been saved for this skill yet.
run.presetNamePlaceholder: Interview prep, weekly review, advanced mode...
run.copyRecentRunPromptFailed: Failed to copy the recent run prompt
run.recentRunLoadedFromLink: Loaded inputs from the selected recent run
run.fieldDescriptionFallback: No description provided for this input yet.
run.noInputs: This skill does not define any input fields yet.
run.analysisDescription: Run a stateless MiniMax analysis against the filled prompt before using it elsewhere.

benchmark.title: Benchmark Scorecard
benchmark.description: Run MiniMax against a saved prompt version to score clarity, reusability, controllability, and deployment readiness.
benchmark.noVersion: Save this prompt first so a version can be benchmarked.
benchmark.compareDescription: Pick two benchmark runs to see whether the latest revision improved.

evolution.title: Latest Evolution Compare
evolution.empty: No evolution comparison is available for this strategy yet.

collections.title: Collections
collections.empty: No collections yet. Create one to group prompts and modules into a reusable pack.
collections.deleteDescription: This removes the collection shell and its item ordering, but does not delete the underlying prompts or modules.
collections.selectItem: Choose a prompt or module first.

form.description: Use collections to bundle prompts and modules into repeatable solution packs.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What problem does this collection solve?

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Enter the admin password to unlock the Prompt IDE.

agent.title: Agent Analysis
agent.savePromptFirst: Save the prompt before running agent analysis.

refactor.title: Agent Refactor
refactor.description: Use MiniMax to prepare a cleaner prompt draft, reusable variables, and module extraction suggestions.
refactor.saveFirst: Save the prompt before running or applying refactor suggestions.
refactor.draftApplied: Refactor draft applied as the new working copy

diff.title: Draft Diff
diff.description: Review the current working copy against the MiniMax refactor draft before applying it.
diff.noChanges: The refactor draft already matches the current working copy.

evolution.title: Evolution Benchmark
evolution.description: After accepting a refactor, compare the new version against your baseline or previous version.
evolution.empty: Apply the draft or variables to generate an automatic benchmark comparison.

draft.title: Cleaned Draft
draft.description: A read-only draft prepared by MiniMax. Applying it updates the prompt and creates a new version snapshot.

variables.title: Suggested Variables
variables.description: Reusable variable metadata extracted from the refactor proposal.

modules.title: Extracted Modules
modules.description: Select the reusable building blocks you want to save into the module library.
modules.none: No reusable module suggestions were generated.
modules.selectHint: Select at least one module suggestion to create it.

quickAdd.title: Add Created Modules To A Collection
quickAdd.description: Drop the newly created modules into an existing collection so they immediately become part of a reusable pack.
quickAdd.createdAndAdded: Created a collection and added {count} module(s)
quickAdd.noCollections: No collections yet. Create one first, then come back and add these modules.

risk.prompt-type: Prompt targets a specialized task type
risk.complexity-high: Prompt complexity is high and may need tighter control
risk.meta-prompt: Prompt behaves like a meta-prompt or prompt generator
risk.requires-file-system-output: Task expects file system output or generated artifacts
risk.requires-multiple-templates: Task likely needs multiple coordinated templates
risk.requires-directory-structure: Task likely needs a directory or project structure
risk.lifecycle-management-required: Task needs lifecycle management across multiple steps
risk.testing-framework-required: Task likely requires a testing or verification framework
risk.external-inspiration-not-direct-copy: Use external inspiration carefully without direct copying
risk.actionableGoal: Prompt asks for an actionable goal
